title: SCP-001, The Scarlet King
description: Protect your world from the Scarlet King, before he manifests and destroys it
body:
The Scarlet King adds a new entity. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-001, also known as the Scarlet King.


If you remain in the Nether for too long, the Scarlet King will be able to manifest into the overworld. Once activated, Cultists begin spawning on the surface in groups, chanting and performing rituals to increase the Scarlet King Manifestation. As the manifestation rises, the world becomes progressively corrupted. Red particles fill the sky, monsters grow stronger, blood rain falls, lightning strikes, and sooner or later, the Scarlet King will appear in the overworld. The goal is not to kill him, but to weaken his manifestation and seal him using ritual chains. Depending on how high the manifestation is when sealed, different endings occur, including complete world destruction.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► How can I know how high the manifestation is?

You can find out how high the manifestation is by using a new item called "Manifestation Clock"

You can also find out by using the command /gamerule scarletKingManifestation

► How can I turn off the Scarlet King Music?

You can turn off the music of the Scarlet King by setting the gamerule "enableScarletKingMusic" to false.

► How can I avoid the Bad Ending?

You can avoid the bad ending of the Scarlet King by setting the gamerule "scarletKingSafemode" to true.

► How can I reset the Scarlet King Manifestation?

You can reset the Manifestation of the Scarlet King by using the command "/reset_scarletking".

► How can I reset the Bad Ending?

You can reset the Bad Ending of the Scarlet King by using the command "/reset_scarletking_ending".

► How can I enable the Scarlet King?

You can enable the Scarlet King by using a new Creative Item.

► How can I configurate the Manifestation?

You can configurate the manifestation level by chaning the number of the gamerule "scarletKingManifestation"

► Where does SCP-001 spawn?

SCP-001 can only spawn if the manifestation is up to 100 or higher, and a player approaches cultists that are chanting infront of a sacrafice. The Manifestation in the overworld only begins after a player spends too much time in the nether.


</details>



![Scarlet King](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2095e397f431e74efe9a036c6a50b9a178e56c8.png)

The Scarlet King is a colossal eldritch entity that manifests once the manifestation reaches its above 100. He is completely immune to direct damage and remains stationary, towering over the landscape while constantly facing the nearest player. When he appears, the screen violently shakes and overwhelming sounds fill the world as he slowly rises to full size. After a short delay, massive indestructible pillars erupt from the ground around him, each crowned with chanting cultists. Beams of energy connect the pillars to the King, strengthening his manifestation. As long as chanters remain alive atop the pillars, his power continues to grow. The goal is not to kill the Scarlet King, but to weaken him by eliminating the chanters. When all pillars collapse, he becomes vulnerable for a brief period before regrowing them again. During this time, he won't attack or grow in strenght. Banishing chains can be obtained and thrown onto him to bind his power. If the manifestation infreases, he unleashes increasingly devastating abilities, including withering auras, gravitational pull, blood projectiles with auto-aim, grasping hands from the ground, minions, global slowness effects, throwing moons at you, dashes or smashes with giant hands, spawn portals around him, generate protective shields around the chantlers, trying to grab players with a chain and small orbs which follow the player. If manifestation reaches 1000, the world is destroyed by Scarlet corruption unless safemode is enabled. If a player has used 4 banishing chains on the scarlet king, and the manifestation is above 500 but under 100, the scarlet king will be sealed away, but cultists still spawn and trying to bring the Scarlet King back. However, if the manifestation stays below 500, the scarlet king will be sealed completly and his crown is dropped. No more cultists will spawn and the Scarlet King only returns if the crown is thrown in lava in the nether.
 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
